statusLine.command: input=$(cat); model_id=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.id // empty'); model_name=''; case "$model_id" in *opus-4.7*) model_name='opus' ;; *sonnet-4.6*) model_name='sonnet' ;; *haiku-4.5*) model_name='haiku' ;; *) model_name=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name // empty') ;; esac; used=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.used_percentage // empty'); if [ -n "$used" ]; then printf '%s %d%%' "$model_name" "${used%.*}"; else echo "$model_name"; fi
